ham.subject: This Week’s Exclusive Deals – Grab Yours Now!
ham.body:
Hi there,

We’re excited to bring you this week’s top picks! From 30% off on premium fitness gear to exclusive access to our new home décor line, there’s something for everyone.

Don’t miss out – shop now!

Best,
Your Favorite Store

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Package Delivery Fee Pending – Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

Your FedEx shipment with reference number 123456789 was marked as "missed delivery". To avoid further delays, please pay the delivery fee of Rs. 250 at the earliest.

Click here to pay: <URL>

Thank you,
FedEx India
